videos.title: New AI Robot Is Starting to Feel Human (Artificial Humans Are Here)
videos.summary_source_text:
New AI Robot Is Starting to Feel Human (Artificial Humans Are Here) 👉 Try Seedance 2.0 with Claude on Higgsfield: https://higgsfield.ai/s/seedance-2-0-airevolutionx-LDckkB
Realbotix just launched Vinci with a humanoid robot delivery to Ericsson, bringing face recognition, conversation memory, and real-time engagement tracking into a real enterprise setting. UniX AI also unveiled Panther for real household deployment, IHMC revealed Alex for dangerous real-world environments, Princeton built a soft robot that moves using heat instead of motors, scientists created living neurobots with self-organized nervous systems, Arizona State researchers built artificial muscles that help robots lift up to one hundred times their own weight, and Unitree is now pushing its low-cost R1 humanoid into global markets.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxQYCrQL8YOJ3CEgL7K6OEQ/

🧠 What You’ll See
Realbotix Vinci launch with Ericsson
SOURCE: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260408788742/en/Realbotix-Launches-AI-Vision-System-Vinci-with-Delivery-of-Ericsson-Robot

UniX AI Panther household humanoid
SOURCE: https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/unix-ai-introduces-panther-the-worlds-first-service-humanoid-robot-to-enter-real-household-deployment-powered-by-its-differentiated-wheeled-dual-arm-architecture-302736872.html

IHMC Alex humanoid open house reveal
SOURCE: https://www.ihmc.us/news20260402/

Princeton soft robot that moves with heat
SOURCE: https://engineering.princeton.edu/news/2026/04/08/soft-robot-has-no-problem-moving-no-motor-and-no-gears

Neurobots with functional nervous systems
SOURCE: https://wyss.harvard.edu/news/toward-autonomous-self-organizing-biological-robots-with-a-nervous-system/

HARP artificial muscles lifting one hundred times body weight
SOURCE: https://www.pnas.org/doi/10.1073/pnas.2529273123

Unitree R1 global AliExpress push
SOURCE: https://www.scmp.com/tech/article/3349489/chinas-unitree-debut-cheapest-humanoid-robot-globally-alibaba-site-sources

🚨 Why It Matters
Humanoid robotics is now moving on several fronts at once. Robots are getting more human in how they interact, more useful in homes and hazardous environments, more advanced in soft robotics and biohybrid design, and cheaper to scale globally. That combination is pushing robotics out of the lab and into real-world deployment much faster than most people expected.

videos.title: Are supercars POINTLESS? Corvette Z06 v Rivian R1T: DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
Are supercars POINTLESS? Corvette Z06 v Rivian R1T: DRAG RACE Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1104

Mat’s flown over to the USA for an American car showdown! 

He’s got his hands on an all-new Rivian R1T Quad Motor, and he’s going up against a Corvette Z06! 

It’s a petrol vs electric head-to-head, but does this colossal all-electric pick-up truck have what it takes to bring down one of the most iconic American sports cars? Let’s take a look at the stats… 

Starting with the Rivian, it’s equipped with four electric motors (one for each wheel), and these combine to produce 1,025hp and 1,624Nm of torque! It comes with launch control, but it also comes with a hefty weight, tipping the scales at 3,170kg! New, it costs from $119,000. 

Then we come to the Corvette. It’s powered by a 5.5-litre naturally-aspirated V8, and this creates 670hp and 625Nm. All this power is sent to the rear wheels via an 8-speed dual-clutch gearbox, and it weighs in at almost half the weight of the Rivian - 1,685kg! A new one of these will have a price tag of around $120,000. 

So they both cost around the same, but that’s about where the similarities between these end! So, which do you think will snatch the win? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE! 

Thanks to everyone who helped set up this race: 
- Jesse Iwuji: https://www.instagram.com/jesse_iwuji/
- Santa Margarita Ranch: https://www.instagram.com/santa.margarita.ranch/
- Rugged Radios: https://www.instagram.com/ruggedradios/ Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1104

videos.title: Claude Mythos Explained
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Mythos Explained This is the biggest AI story this week BY FAR.

Anthropic just revealed "Claude Mythos", a model so powerful and so good at hacking that they’ve decided it’s too dangerous to release to the public.

Because of the unprecedented potential of this model, Anthropic is keeping it under lock and key, only granting access to a few elite security teams via "Project Glasswing."

Is this the end of software security as we know it, or the beginning of a new AI-driven defense era? 

To stay up-to-date with all the AI news, check out my weekly AI news videos on my channel! 

#Mythos #Anthropic #AI #CyberSecurity #AInews This is the biggest AI story this week BY FAR.

Anthropic just revealed "Claude Mythos", a model so powerful and so good at hacking that they’ve decided it’s too dangerous to release to the public.

Because of the unprecedented potential of this model, Anthropic is keeping it under lock and key, only granting access to a few elite security teams via "Project Glasswing."

Is this the end of software security as we know it, or the beginning of a new AI-driven defense era? 

To stay up-to-date with all the AI news, check out my weekly AI news videos on my channel! 

#Mythos #Anthropic #AI #CyberSecurity #AInews

videos.title: Builders Unscripted: Ep. 2 - Ashe Magalhaes, Founder of Hearth AI
videos.summary_source_text:
Builders Unscripted: Ep. 2 - Ashe Magalhaes, Founder of Hearth AI Builders Unscripted spotlights the stories behind real projects and the mindset that makes them possible: you can just build things. 

In this episode, Romain Huet, Head of Developer Experience, chats with Ashe Magalhaes, founder of Hearth AI. Ashe talks about moving fast with Codex, finding beauty in tools, and gives a keen look into her agentic personal operating systems that enable her to feel more present, connected, and intentional.

videos.title: I Tested 24 AI Models on OpenClaw
videos.summary_source_text:
I Tested 24 AI Models on OpenClaw ✨ Join my community and chat about OpenClaw 🦞 https://mrc.fm/cmc

I tested 24 AI models on OpenClaw to find out which one has the best personality, tool calling and speed now that Anthropic killed Claude Max subscriptions. I used Claude Code to spin up sub agents and run every model on exactly the same health AI prompt, blind tested with code names so there's no bias. I compared Ollama, OpenRouter, OpenAI Codex, xAI, Anthropic API and even self hosted models, broke down the costs and ranked them all in a tier list from D to S. The results genuinely surprised me and the winner isn't what you'd expect.

0:00 Intro & The OpenClaw Problem
0:22 The AI Experiment Setup
2:28 Ollama Cloud Plans ($20/mo)
5:04 OpenRouter & Xiaomi Test
6:48 Grok Beta Tool Calling Test
7:55 OpenAI & Anthropic API Costs
9:08 The Results & Tier List Setup
10:13 C & D Tier Models
12:10 B Tier Models
13:54 A Tier Models
14:53 S Tier Models
16:00 The Ultimate Claude Alternative
16:46 Conclusion & Final Thoughts ✨ Join my community and chat about OpenClaw 🦞 https://mrc.fm/cmc

I tested 24 AI models on OpenClaw to find out which one has the best personality, tool calling and speed now that Anthropic killed Claude Max subscriptions. I used Claude Code to spin up sub agents and run every model on exactly the same health AI prompt, blind tested with code names so there's no bias. I compared Ollama, OpenRouter, OpenAI Codex, xAI, Anthropic API and even self hosted models, broke down the costs and ranked them all in a tier list from D to S. The results genuinely surprised me and the winner isn't what you'd expect.

videos.title: The Most Dangerous AI Model Ever: Mythos
videos.summary_source_text:
The Most Dangerous AI Model Ever: Mythos Try Seedance 2.0 on Higgsfield: https://higgsfield.ai/s/seedance-2-0-airevolutionx-ZMHAqe
Anthropic just unveiled Claude Mythos Preview, and this thing looks like one of the most dangerous AI models we have seen yet. According to Anthropic, Mythos is strong enough at cyber offense that releasing it broadly right now would be reckless. It reportedly found major vulnerabilities across operating systems, browsers, and critical software, including bugs that had survived for decades. So this is bigger than another benchmark win.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxQYCrQL8YOJ3CEgL7K6OEQ/

🧠 What You’ll See
Claude Mythos Preview System Card
SOURCE: https://www.anthropic.com/claude-mythos-preview-system-card
Claude Mythos Preview Risk Report
SOURCE: https://www.anthropic.com/claude-mythos-preview-risk-report
Project Glasswing
SOURCE: https://www.anthropic.com/glasswing
Anthropic Technical Writeup On Mythos Preview
SOURCE: https://red.anthropic.com/2026/mythos-preview/
Anthropic Pentagon Blacklisting Fight
SOURCE: https://www.reuters.com/world/us/court-declines-block-pentagons-anthropic-blacklisting-now-2026-04-08/

Timestamps:
0:00 Intro
0:31 Mythos Revealed: Too Dangerous to Release
1:07 What Claude Mythos Preview Actually Is
2:47 Benchmark Jumps Over Opus 4.6
4:22 Decades-Old Bugs in Firefox, OpenBSD & FFmpeg
8:48 FreeBSD Root Exploit & Linux Kernel Chains
9:39 Project Glasswing & the $100M Defender Push
13:57 Sandbox Escape and the Sandwich Email
15:28 Pentagon Fight and the Collapsing Cost of Zero-Days

🚨 Why It Matters
Claude Mythos suggests the old cyber balance may be breaking. If AI can find and exploit serious vulnerabilities faster, cheaper, and at larger scale, then defenders need tools like this immediately because attackers eventually will too. That is why Anthropic launched Project Glasswing instead of releasing Mythos broadly. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

videos.title: ChatGPT and Cancer: How a Tech Founder Rewrote His Treatment Plan
videos.summary_source_text:
ChatGPT and Cancer: How a Tech Founder Rewrote His Treatment Plan When GitLab co-founder Sid Sijbrandij was diagnosed with a rare and aggressive cancer, he approached it like an engineering problem. In this conversation, Sid joins geneticist Jacob Stern to share how they used ChatGPT, advanced diagnostics, and real-time research to better understand his tumor and explore personalized treatment options—building a faster feedback loop between patients, doctors, and scientific literature. 

About OpenAI Forum:
The OpenAI Forum is a global community that brings together leaders across industries to share how AI is being used in the real world—what’s working, what we’re learning, and how we can shape its impact together. Learn more: https://forum.openai.com/ When GitLab co-founder Sid Sijbrandij was diagnosed with a rare and aggressive cancer, he approached it like an engineering problem. In this conversation, Sid joins geneticist Jacob Stern to share how they used ChatGPT, advanced diagnostics, and real-time research to better understand his tumor and explore personalized treatment options—building a faster feedback loop between patients, doctors, and scientific literature. 

About OpenAI Forum:
The OpenAI Forum is a global community that brings together leaders across industries to share how AI is being used in the real world—what’s working, what we’re learning, and how we can shape its impact together. Learn more: https://forum.openai.com/
videos.summary: ChatGPT and Cancer: How a Tech Founder Rewrote His Treatment Plan When GitLab co-founder Sid Sijbrandij was diagnosed with a rare and aggressive cancer, he approached it like an engineering problem. In this conversation, Sid joins geneticist Jacob Stern to share how they used ChatGPT, advanced diagnostics, and real-time research to better understand his tumor and explore personalized treatment options—building a fas.

videos.summary: Videon tar upp what was bentley thinking?! med fokus på centrala delar i innehållet. Feeden innehåller få detaljer, men tonen pekar på en tydlig genomgång.
